reasoning: The 10-year Treasury yield recently declined to 4.00 as of October 24, 2025. Following instructions, the short-term forecast anchors near this 0.67 value around 0.65. As the forecast horizon extends to November 25 and January 24, uncertainty fundamentally increases due to macroeconomic variables, potential shifts in monetary policy, and the inherently random-walk nature of yields over longer horizons, thus the probabilities are progressively adjusted closer to 0.5 (0.58 and 0.54, respectively).
